Meaning.En: to buy something, especially something important or expensive
Meaning.Example: She decided to purchase a new laptop for her online classes.

Situation.Vi: Mua một món đồ đắt tiền hoặc quan trọng.
Situation.En: Buying an important or expensive item.

Situation.Vi: Hoàn tất giao dịch mua bán bằng tiền hoặc tín dụng.
Situation.En: Completing a transaction involving money or credit.

Meaning.En: something that has been bought, especially something valuable or expensive
Meaning.Example: The antique vase was her most prized purchase.

Situation.Vi: Nói về món đồ vừa mới mua, đặc biệt là món đắt tiền.
Situation.En: Referring to a newly acquired item, especially an expensive one.

Situation.Vi: Trong ngữ cảnh kinh doanh: tài sản hoặc hàng hóa đã được mua về để bán lại.
Situation.En: In business: goods or assets acquired for resale or use.
